mapper.sql: id, plate_number, custom_number, model_id, company_id, region_id, factory_date, launch_date, air_conditioned, source, remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT v.id, v.plate_number, v.custom_number, v.model_id, v.company_id, v.region_id, v.factory_date, v.launch_date, v.air_conditioned, v.source, v.remark, v.created_at, v.updated_at, m.id AS m_id, m.name AS m_name, m.brand_id AS m_brand_id, b.id AS b_id, b.name AS b_name, b.chn_name AS b_chn_name, c.id AS c_id, c.name AS c_name, c.region_id AS c_region_id, cr.id AS cr_id, cr.name AS cr_name, cr.parent_id AS cr_parent_id, cr.level AS cr_level, r.id AS r_id, r.name AS r_name, r.parent_id AS r_parent_id, r.level AS r_level FROM vehicle v LEFT JOIN model m ON v.model_id = m.id LEFT JOIN brand b ON m.brand_id = b.id LEFT JOIN company c ON v.company_id = c.id LEFT JOIN region cr ON c.region_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN region r ON v.region_id = r.id WHERE v.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM vehicle WHERE REPLACE(plate_number, ' ', '') = REPLACE(#{plateNumber}, ' ', '') ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT v.id, v.plate_number, v.custom_number, v.model_id, v.company_id, v.region_id, v.factory_date, v.launch_date, v.air_conditioned, v.source, v.remark, v.created_at, v.updated_at, m.id AS m_id, m.name AS m_name, m.brand_id AS m_brand_id, b.id AS b_id, b.name AS b_name, b.chn_name AS b_chn_name, c.id AS c_id, c.name AS c_name, c.region_id AS c_region_id, cr.id AS cr_id, cr.name AS cr_name, cr.parent_id AS cr_parent_id, cr.level AS cr_level, r.id AS r_id, r.name AS r_name, r.parent_id AS r_parent_id, r.level AS r_level FROM vehicle v LEFT JOIN model m ON v.model_id = m.id LEFT JOIN brand b ON m.brand_id = b.id LEFT JOIN company c ON v.company_id = c.id LEFT JOIN region cr ON c.region_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN region r ON v.region_id = r.id WHERE REPLACE(v.plate_number, ' ', '') = REPLACE(#{plateNumber}, ' ', '') ORDER BY v.id ASC
SELECT FROM vehicle WHERE region_id = #{regionId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN launch_date IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ASC, launch_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM vehicle WHERE company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN launch_date IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ASC, launch_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM vehicle WHERE model_id = #{modelId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN launch_date IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ASC, launch_date DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO vehicle ( plate_number, custom_number, model_id, company_id, region_id, factory_date, launch_date, air_conditioned, source, remark ) VALUES ( #{plateNumber}, #{customNumber}, #{model.id}, #{company.id},
#{region.id}
NULL
, #{factoryDate}, #{launchDate}, #{airConditioned}, #{source}, #{remark} )
